business_ideas.idea: Bingo Loco—boozy bingo events with performers, confetti, drinks.
Food challenge bar nights: eating contests with cheering friends, bar profits on drinks.
Meat smoking equipment brand: Trager competitor with pellet subscriptions, creator partnerships.

predictions.text: Meat smoking brand could become a multi-billion dollar business like Trager.
Most Milk Road X newsletter copies will wash out; few winners will dominate.
